summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements with good coverage. All 8 REQs have substantial implementation. However, a few specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the loading spinner text is not exactly 'Cooking delicious Indian recipes...', the API call uses number=8 instead of number=5, and the doughnut chart uses a Pie chart rather than a true doughnut. The secondary green color #2D6A4F is not explicitly in the palette.

missing_requirements.requirement: Loading spinner must show exact text 'Cooking delicious Indian recipes...' during API call
missing_requirements.reason: The IngredientSearch component file is truncated and the exact loading text string is not visible in the shown code, so this AC cannot be confirmed as implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: API call must use number=5 for findByIngredients as specified
missing_requirements.reason: The useSearchRecipes hook uses number=8 instead of the specified number=5 in the Spoonacular API call URL.

missing_requirements.requirement: Secondary green color #2D6A4F must be used in the palette
missing_requirements.reason: The tailwind config defines forest green as oklch(0.42 0.14 145) which approximates green but the exact hex #2D6A4F specified in the requirements is not explicitly mapped or referenced.

hallucinated_features.description: Tag-based ingredient input system where users press Enter or comma to add individual ingredient chips/tags with visual removal buttons
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requests a simple comma-separated text input field. The implementation adds a complex tag/chip input system beyond what was specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Ingredient match percentage progress bar on recipe cards
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requests used and missing ingredient count badges on recipe cards. A percentage match progress bar was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Quick suggestion chips in the search section with pre-populated ingredient combinations
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request pre-populated suggestion chips in the ingredient search section.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer section with brand description and links
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer was requested in the build specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Session summary stat cards in the analytics section beyond the two charts
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requests a bar chart and doughnut chart in the analytics section. Additional session stat cards were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile hamburger menu in the navbar
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request a mobile menu or hamburger navigation. It specifies a sticky navbar with logo and anchor links only.

hallucinated_features.description: Decorative SVG wave at the bottom of the hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not mention a decorative wave element at the bottom of the hero banner.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats row in hero section showing 5000+ Recipes, 100% Indian Cuisine, Real-time Analytics
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request a statistics row in the hero section.

hallucinated_features.description: View Analytics CTA button in the hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only describes a Find Recipes CTA for the hero. A second View Analytics button was not requested.
